text: The subject property consists of a single-story pre-engineered metal warehouse/shop building containing approximately 2,560 square feet of gross building area situated on an approximately 2.00-acre site (87,120 square feet) located at 18 Kelli Court in Clinton, Illinois. The property is located within a small commercial/industrial area with access from U.S. Highway 51 and Illinois Route 54, providing convenient regional connectivity.
